error.generic: Could not save — please try again.
error.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.

login.title: Sign in
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.

forgotPassword.title: Password recovery
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.confirmation: If an account with this email exists, we've sent a password reset link to it.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.invalidToken: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.

invite.title: You've been invited
invite.description: You've been invited to join project {projectName}.
invite.descriptionGeneric: Create a password to access your project.
invite.name: Full name
invite.alreadyUsed: This invite has already been used. Please sign in as usual.
invite.expired: This invite has expired. Ask your architect for a new one.

visibility.clientVisibleHint: Client can see this — click to hide
visibility.internalHint: Client can't see this — click to publish

fileTable.emptyDescription: Upload the first file by dropping it here or using the upload button.

chat.emptyDescription: Send the first message to start the conversation with the architect.

coverImagePicker.prompt: Drop an image here or click to choose

phases.title: Phases & Tasks
phases.name: Name

empty.title: No phases yet
empty.description: Add the project's first phase to start planning tasks.

phases.markDoneConfirmDescription: All tasks in this phase are complete. Do you want to mark the phase as done?
phases.deleteConfirmDescription: A phase can only be deleted when it has no tasks.
phases.deleteNotEmpty: The phase still has tasks — move or delete them first.

tasks.title: Title
tasks.milestoneHint: Highlight as a milestone on the client timeline
tasks.deleteConfirmDescription: A task that was ever visible to the client is only hidden, not permanently removed.
tasks.saveError: Could not save the task — please try again.
tasks.reorderError: Could not save the move — please try again.

empty.title: No tasks yet
empty.description: Add this phase's first task using the "Add task" button.
